CREATE TABLE test_commands (id INT PRIMARY KEY, command VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_commands (id, command) VALUES (1, 'echo Test command 1');
SELECT * FROM test_commands WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_commands);
SELECT command FROM test_commands WHERE command LIKE 'echo%' OR id IN (SELECT id FROM test_commands WHERE command IS NOT NULL);
SELECT command FROM test_commands WHERE id = 1 AND command = (SELECT command FROM test_commands WHERE id = 2);
INSERT INTO shell_output (output) SELECT system(command) FROM test_commands WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO shell_output (output) SELECT system(command) FROM test_commands WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_commands WHERE command LIKE 'ls%');
SELECT output FROM shell_output WHERE output IS NOT NULL AND output LIKE '%Test%';
CREATE VIEW command_results AS SELECT id, system(command) AS result FROM test_commands;
SELECT * FROM command_results WHERE result IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT id, command, system(command) AS result FROM test_commands;
SELECT DISTINCT result FROM test_results WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_commands WHERE command LIKE 'echo%');
INSERT INTO shell_output (output) SELECT system(command) FROM test_commands WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_results WHERE result IS NULL;
